race.comment: TONKIN (11) returned from an eight-week let-up with a modest effort behind FLYING DESTINY over this distance at the Gold Coast last start. Has an excellent 1000m record, albeit all on left-handed tracks. Worth another chance with Williams taking the ride. GIVEMETHEBEATBOYS (1) scored a game win first-up over this course and distance then failed to run out 1300m at Rockhampton last time. Multiple stakes winner in the UK - can test this field if he brings his A-game. STEADY READY (4) gets a pass mark for his solid third when resuming over this distance at the Gold Coast four weeks ago. Four-time winner here at 1000m and his second-up strike rate sits at 50%. Everything points towards a big run. ZOUPERB (9) closed well for second at any old odds when resuming in the Listed Bright Shadow at Doomben last start. Can run another big race with blinkers going on for the first time. MONTE SUPREME (6) drops back to her pet trip with the blinkers back on - expecting a big run.
